privileged_info_summary: Task uses real NHANES patient data: patient Clifford Taylor (ID 8471, DOB 1984-08-15, male) exists in the NHANES dataset with 9,375 patients. All appointment metadata is valid: 'Office Visit' is a standard LibreHealth EHR appointment type (category ID 5), 'admin' is a valid provider/user (Administrator role, user ID 1), and '10:00 AM' is standard appointment time format.
